name: Acolyte
starting_equipment: Holy symbol (gift), prayer book or prayer wheel, 5 sticks of incense, vestments, set of common clothes, pouch with 15 gp
feature: Shelter of the Faithful: receive free healing/care at temples of your faith; attendant priests provide modest lifestyle support.

name: Charlatan
starting_equipment: Set of fine clothes, disguise kit, tools of con of choice (10 stoppered bottles of colored liquid, set of weighted dice, deck of marked cards, signet ring of imaginary duke), pouch with 15 gp
feature: False Identity: maintain a second persona with documentation.

name: Criminal
starting_equipment: Crowbar, set of dark common clothes (with hood), pouch with 15 gp
feature: Criminal Contact: have a contact who can pass messages to/from criminal underworld.

name: Entertainer
starting_equipment: Musical instrument, favor of admirer (love letter, lock of hair, trinket), costume, pouch with 15 gp
feature: By Popular Demand: free lodging and food at venues where you perform.

name: Folk Hero
starting_equipment: Set of artisan's tools, shovel, iron pot, set of common clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: Rustic Hospitality: common folk shelter and hide you when needed.

name: Guild Artisan
starting_equipment: Set of artisan's tools, letter of introduction from guild, traveler's clothes, pouch with 15 gp
feature: Guild Membership: dues 5 gp/month grant guild support and lodging.

name: Hermit
starting_equipment: Scroll case (notes from studies), winter blanket, common clothes, herbalism kit, 5 gp
feature: Discovery: you have a unique and powerful insight (player + DM defined).

name: Noble
starting_equipment: Set of fine clothes, signet ring, scroll of pedigree, purse with 25 gp
feature: Position of Privilege: granted access to high society.

name: Outlander
starting_equipment: Staff, hunting trap, trophy from animal you killed, set of traveler's clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: Wanderer: navigate without map; shelter for self and 5 in wild.

name: Sage
starting_equipment: Bottle of black ink, quill, small knife, letter from dead colleague, set of common clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: Researcher: when don't know information you know where/whom to ask.

name: Sailor
starting_equipment: Belaying pin (club), 50ft silk rope, lucky charm, set of common clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: Ship's Passage: arrange free passage on a sailing ship for self + companions.

name: Soldier
starting_equipment: Insignia of rank, trophy from a fallen enemy, deck of cards or set of bone dice, set of common clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: Military Rank: soldiers who recognize your rank obey commands within reason.

name: Urchin
starting_equipment: Small knife, map of city you grew up in, pet mouse, token to remember parents, set of common clothes, pouch with 10 gp
feature: City Secrets: travel through any city at twice normal pace through hidden routes.
suggested_traits: Resourceful, suspicious, kind to other underdogs.
